name: Director
description: Oversees the overall astronomy program and operations.

name: Lead Researcher
description: Leads scientific research projects and mentors team members.

name: Telescope Operator
description: Operates and configures telescopes for scheduled observations.

name: Data Analyst
description: Processes captured measurements, spectra, and image data.

name: Equipment Technician
description: Maintains observatory equipment and performs calibrations.

name: Event Coordinator
description: Plans and manages public workshops and outreach events.

name: Student Researcher
description: Supports research projects while learning astronomy methods.

name: Volunteer
description: Assists with events, logistics, and general support tasks.

name: Publication Editor
description: Prepares reports and research papers for publication.

name: Collaboration Liaison
description: Coordinates with partner institutions and shared initiatives.
